name: zorskill
description: zorskill - AI-powered skill marketplace for Claude Code by ZorCorp

plugins.name: kf-claude
plugins.description: KnowledgeFactory for Claude Code - AI-powered knowledge capture, Obsidian integration, and publishing with MCP tools

plugins.name: kf-cli
plugins.description: KnowledgeFactory CLI - Native CLI implementation, no Docker/MCP required

plugins.name: cx-trip-pa
plugins.description: Search and book flights on Trip.com with agent-browser using the /flight command.

plugins.name: code-to-video
plugins.description: Turn existing web source code into a shareable Google Drive demo video — analyzes code, generates Stitch UI screens, renders a Remotion MP4, and uploads to Google Drive.

plugins.name: prototyper
plugins.description: Convert source code or Stitch UI designs into a standalone interactive HTML demo with auto-play, simulated cursor, and animations. Includes a built-in HKUST Store Virtual Try-On demo.

plugins.name: oc-on-cf
plugins.description: Deploy OpenClaw on Cloudflare using the /deploy-openclaw command, including the bundled moltworker project.

plugins.name: yellow-restaurant
plugins.description: Find nearby yellow restaurants (黃店食肆) from the Yellow-Blue Map API using GPS coordinates.
